summary: Iteration 51 - Backend testing of Phase 1 Travel Booking Fixes. All 16 tests PASSED. Features verified: 1) PaymentSuccess.jsx bug fix - uses api client with correct access_token instead of raw fetch with wrong localStorage key. 2) Seat reservation validation: rejects over-reservation, validates duplicate seats, validates seat range (1 to total_seats). 3) New GET /api/seat-bookings/available-counts public endpoint working. 4) GET /api/seat-bookings/availability returns correct structure.

available_counts_tests.test_available_counts_endpoint_exists: PASS - Returns counts with total, taken, available per route

seat_reservation_validation_tests.test_reserve_validates_total_availabilit: PASS - Rejects when requested > available seats
seat_reservation_validation_tests.test_reserve_validates_seat_range: PASS - Rejects seat 0 and seats > total_seats

features_verified.payment_success_bug_fix: VERIFIED - PaymentSuccess.jsx uses api.get() which correctly reads access_token from localStorage (api/client.js line 45)
features_verified.seat_over_reservation_validation: VERIFIED - POST /api/seat-bookings/reserve rejects if requested_count > available_count (seat_bookings.py lines 100-114)
features_verified.seat_duplicate_validation: VERIFIED - POST /api/seat-bookings/reserve rejects already reserved/booked seats (seat_bookings.py lines 84-98)
features_verified.seat_range_validation: VERIFIED - POST /api/seat-bookings/reserve validates seat numbers 1 to total_seats (seat_bookings.py lines 116-123)
features_verified.available_counts_api: VERIFIED - GET /api/seat-bookings/available-counts returns dynamic counts per route (public endpoint)
features_verified.availability_api: VERIFIED - GET /api/seat-bookings/availability returns total_seats, available_count, booked_seats
features_verified.travel_results_dynamic_counts: VERIFIED - TravelResults.jsx fetches from /available-counts and updates available_seats (lines 461-472)
features_verified.sold_out_display: VERIFIED - TravelResults shows 'Sold Out' when available_seats === 0 (lines 164, 267)

critical_code_review_comments: PaymentSuccess.jsx correctly imports and uses api from client.js which handles auth tokens properly
Seat reservation has proper order of validation: duplicate check → availability check → range check
available-counts endpoint is correctly implemented as public (no auth required) for search results
TravelResults correctly maps available_seats from API response to trip display
seed_data_creation: Test seat bookings created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 verified Phase 1 travel booking fixes. All seat reservation validations working (over-reservation, duplicates, range). PaymentSuccess uses correct api client. GET /api/seat-bookings/available-counts returns dynamic seat counts for TravelResults page. All 16 backend tests passed.
